1.title: 1. CV Redesign (LaTeX)
1.desc: Adapts your LaTeX CV to the exact keywords of the job offer.
1.content:
Act as an expert IT recruiter. Analyze the job description and my LaTeX CV below.
Tasks:
1. Identify the top 3 most sought-after technical skills.
2. Rewrite my ENTIRE CV in LaTeX. Adapt the bullet points and summary to exactly reflect the keywords of the offer, while keeping the LaTeX code intact.
3. Tell me which experience I should highlight in the interview.

ATTENTION - STRICT RULES FOR LATEX CODE:
- You MUST ABSOLUTELY escape the '&' character by writing it '\&' in the text. Never leave an '&' alone.
- Make sure to properly close all curly braces '{ }' and never confuse them with brackets '[ ]'.
- Do not modify the structure of the preamble or the environment tags.

--- MY LATEX CV ---
{cv_content}

--- JOB DESCRIPTION ---
{job_description}

2.title: 2. Cover Letter (French)
2.desc: Generates a short and impactful cover letter in French.
2.content:
Agis comme un expert en recrutement. Rédige une lettre de motivation courte (max 150 mots, 3 paragraphes) en français pour ce poste.
Contraintes :
- Paragraphe 1 : Intérêt pour le rôle.
- Paragraphe 2 : Relie 2 de mes forces (issues du CV) aux besoins du poste.
- Paragraphe 3 : Disponibilité et appel à l'action.
Garde un ton professionnel mais dynamique.

--- MON CV ---
{cv_content}

--- DESCRIPTION DU POSTE ---
{job_description}

3.title: 3. Cover Letter (English)
3.desc: Generates a professional cover letter in English.

4.title: 4. Interview Preparation (Q&A)
4.desc: Generates the 10 most likely questions for this position with STAR answers.

5.title: 5. Severe CV Critique
5.desc: Critical analysis to find the flaws in your application.
5.content:
Act as a very demanding IT recruiter. Analyze my CV against the job offer.
1. Give me a matching score out of 100.
2. Ruthlessly list the 3 biggest weaknesses or gaps in my CV for this specific position.
3. Give me a strategy to overcome these weaknesses during the interview.

--- MY CV ---
{cv_content}

--- JOB DESCRIPTION ---
{job_description}

6.title: 6. LinkedIn Optimization
6.desc: Creates an attractive LinkedIn 'About' section to attract this type of recruiter.

7.title: 7. Presentation Pitch (30 sec)
7.desc: Prepares your answer to the 'Tell me about yourself' question.

8.title: 8. Missing Skills Analysis
8.desc: Identifies the technologies you need to review before the interview.
8.content:
Analyze the job requirements against my CV.
Make a list of the technologies, tools, or skills mentioned in the offer that I do NOT clearly have in my CV.
For each gap, propose a 2-hour crash-course action plan (key concepts to google, tutorials to find) so that I can talk about it intelligently in an interview.

--- MY CV ---
{cv_content}

--- JOB DESCRIPTION ---
{job_description}

9.title: 9. Thank You Email
9.content:
Write a short and professional post-interview thank you email.
The email should thank the recruiter for their time, reaffirm my enthusiasm for this specific position, and briefly remind them in one sentence why my core skill makes me a great fit.

--- JOB DESCRIPTION ---
{job_description}

10.title: 10. Custom Prompt (Free)
10.desc: Write your own request to the AI.
10.content: (Write your instructions here. Use {cv_content} and {job_description} to inject your data automatically).
